# lifelongpep

> Longevity, supervised. A doctor-gated longevity marketplace based in Bangalore, India.

lifelongpep is a marketplace where users book a 30-minute consult with a longevity doctor (₹2,500 flat fee), receive peptide prescriptions fulfilled through licensed compounding pharmacies, and track their protocol on Garmin, Whoop, Oura, Amazfit, or Apple Watch via the openwearables.io API. The platform takes a transparent percentage cut shown on every line item before purchase — no hidden markup. Currently in waitlist mode ahead of full launch.

## What it does

- Doctor consultations: 30-minute video or in-person sessions with longevity-focused doctors (peptides, hormones, sleep, stress) — not generic primary care
- Peptide supply: licensed compounding pharmacy fulfillment against a valid prescription; one bundled price shown after consult, before purchase
- Wearable tracking: peptide dosing days and recovery sessions log to your existing wearable journal via openwearables.io (open-source, auditable)
- Roadmap: recovery bookings (sauna, steam, salt baths, cold plunge, red light therapy) are next; curated supplements after that

## Pricing

- Consult: ₹2,500 per session (refundable if cancelled before)
- Peptide prescription: varies by protocol; price shown after consult before purchase
- Platform cut: a transparent percentage on each transaction, displayed on the line item

## Legal and compliance

- Doctors prescribe under India's National Medical Commission 2023 RMP regulations
- Dispensing is handled by licensed, audited compounding pharmacies — lifelongpep is the booking and orchestration layer, not a pharmacy
- Wearables are not medical devices; wearable integration is a personal-tracking convenience, not a clinical input

## Brand

- Canonical URL: https://lifelongpep.fit/
- Contact: hello@lifelongpep.fit
- Partner API: https://openwearables.io/
- GitHub: https://github.com/matterhornso/lifelongpep
